ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robot */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the robot was used in */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robot */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the robot */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the robot */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robots_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "velocity_data" (
  "velocity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each velocity data point */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the velocity data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the velocity data was recorded */,
  "x_velocity" REAL /* X-axis velocity of the robot */,
  "y_velocity" REAL /* Y-axis velocity of the robot */,
  "z_velocity" REAL /* Z-axis velocity of the robot */,
  "x_velocity_error" REAL /* Error in X-axis velocity measurement */,
  "y_velocity_error" REAL /* Error in Y-axis velocity measurement */,
  "z_velocity_error" REAL /* Error in Z-axis velocity measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the velocity data belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to measure velocity */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the sensor */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure velocity */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the velocity was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("velocity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_velocity_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_velocity_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position_data" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position data point */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the position data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the position data was recorded */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-axis position of the robot */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-axis position of the robot */,
  "z_position" REAL /* Z-axis position of the robot */,
  "x_position_error" REAL /* Error in X-axis position measurement */,
  "y_position_error" REAL /* Error in Y-axis position measurement */,
  "z_position_error" REAL /* Error in Z-axis position measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the position data belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to measure position */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the sensor */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure position */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the position was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_position_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_position_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angular_momentum_data" (
  "angular_momentum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angular momentum data point */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the angular momentum data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the angular momentum data was recorded */,
  "x_angular_momentum" REAL /* X-axis angular momentum of the robot */,
  "y_angular_momentum" REAL /* Y-axis angular momentum of the robot */,
  "z_angular_momentum" REAL /* Z-axis angular momentum of the robot */,
  "x_angular_momentum_error" REAL /* Error in X-axis angular momentum measurement */,
  "y_angular_momentum_error" REAL /* Error in Y-axis angular momentum measurement */,
  "z_angular_momentum_error" REAL /* Error in Z-axis angular momentum measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the angular momentum data belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to measure angular momentum */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the sensor */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure angular momentum */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the angular momentum was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angular_momentum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angular_momentum_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angular_momentum_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data point */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the energy data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the energy data was recorded */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the robot */,
  "energy_error" REAL /* Error in energy measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the energy data belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to measure energy */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the sensor */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure energy */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the energy was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orientation_data" (
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation data point */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the orientation data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the orientation data was recorded */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the robot */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw of the robot */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the robot */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the orientation data belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to measure orientation */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the sensor */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure orientation */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the orientation was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orientation_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orientation_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the database was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., query, insert, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the database */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complexity_data" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the complexity data belongs to */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complexity */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure complexity */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the complexity was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complexity_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complexity_data_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_data" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the time data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure time */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the time was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_data_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unnamed_data" (
  "unnamed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unnamed data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the unnamed data belongs to */,
  "unnamed" REAL /* Unnamed data value */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the unnamed data */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the unnamed data was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unnamed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unnamed_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unnamed_data_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
